title: Red Hat Security Advisory: python3 security update
overview:
An update for python3 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Extended Update Support Long-Life Add-On.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: python3 security update

An update for python3 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Extended Update Support Long-Life Add-On.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for python3 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Advanced Mission Critical Update Support and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.4 Extended Update Support Long-Life Add-On.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
python3-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.src.rpm
platform-python-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
platform-python-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
platform-python-debug-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
platform-python-debug-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
platform-python-devel-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
platform-python-devel-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-debuginfo-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-debuginfo-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-debugsource-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-debugsource-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-idle-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-idle-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-libs-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-libs-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-test-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-test-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.i686.rpm
python3-tkinter-3.6.8-39.el8_4.8.x86_64.rpm

CVE-2025-12084: When building nested elements using xml.dom.minidom methods such as appendChild() that have a dependency on _clear_id_cache() the algorithm is quadratic. Availability can be impacted when building excessively nested documents.
